subcodes.first_line: Lo, We behold the Kingdom as it speaketh and saith: "O ye denizens of the Realm of Might! By God, the King of Kings hath come with sovereignty." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نری الملکوت انه ینطق و یقول یا اهل الجبروت تالله قد اتی مالک الملوک بسلطان
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @proclamation to the people of the world, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
